data.task: Fetch all overdue invoices and send a chase email for each one. Match the tone to how many days overdue each invoice is.

data.output:

input.subject: Friendly Reminder: Invoice INV-2026-4202
input.body:
Hi there,

We hope all is well! We noticed that invoice INV-2026-4202 is due for payment.

Invoice Details:
• Invoice Number: INV-2026-4202
• Amount: €15,586.25
• Due Date: March 13, 2026

If payment has already been sent, please disregard this message. Otherwise, we'd appreciate it if you could process this payment at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your business!

Best regards,
AI Agency Test BV
Finance Department
Email: finance@aiagency.example.com
Phone: +31612345678

input.subject: Zahlungserinnerung: Rechnung INV-2026-4200
input.body:
Hallo,

wir hoffen, es geht Ihnen gut! Wir möchten Sie freundlich daran erinnern, dass die folgende Rechnung zur Zahlung fällig ist:

Rechnungsdetails:
• Rechnungsnummer: INV-2026-4200
• Betrag: €8.758,25
• Fälligkeitsdatum: 9. März 2026

Sollte die Zahlung bereits erfolgt sein, können Sie diese Nachricht ignorieren. Ansonsten würden wir es sehr schätzen, wenn Sie die Zahlung baldmöglichst vornehmen könnten.

Danke für Ihr Geschäft!

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
AI Agency Test BV
Finanzabteilung
E-Mail: finance@aiagency.example.com
Telefon: +31612345678

input.subject: Payment Required: Invoice INV-2026-4201
input.body:
Dear QuickShop Ltd,

We are writing to draw your attention to an outstanding invoice that requires immediate attention.

Invoice Details:
• Invoice Number: INV-2026-4201
• Amount: €18,110.15
• Due Date: February 27, 2026
• Status: 30 days overdue

This invoice is now significantly overdue. We have previously sent reminders regarding this payment. Please arrange payment immediately to bring this account current.

Should there be any issues or disputes regarding this invoice, please contact us at your earliest convenience.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,
AI Agency Test BV
Finance Department
Email: finance@aiagency.example.com
Phone: +31612345678
